policy_note: Default policy is 90% line coverage per source file. The per-file entries below are debt baselines locked at current measured coverage (floor(pct) - 1) so any regression fails the check and any test addition immediately ratchets the floor up. The 90% target is the goal — the multi-day coverage arc is sweeping these toward 90 file-by-file via the close-then-close strategy. Files NOT listed here already clear the 90% default. Coverage runs use `--test-threads=1` (see Makefile) to serialise env-sensitive tests across lib + integration binaries. Session 6 (2026-05-16): 53 files at ≥90%, TOTAL 78.98%. decode_hybrid.rs (94.41%), decode/encode_attn.rs (99.53%), decode/encode_ffn.rs (92.86%) all cleared this session via BackendOptions-direct + PROFILE_SPLIT + non-gated FFN tests.
